turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just so you know, this call is recorded for quality purposes.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: There's a charge on my card I don't recognize at all.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, let me pull up the recent charges and take a look.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I just want to make sure this doesn't happen again next month.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's not good enough. Get me someone who can actually fix this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's fair. I'll escalate this to a manager so we can sort it properly.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I've applied the refund and you'll see it in three to five days. Anything else?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's everything. Thanks for the help.
